message:
feat: add typed memories to gt remember (--type feedback/project/user/reference)

Memories can now be categorized by type for smarter injection at prime time.
Types are encoded in the kv key prefix (memory.<type>.<key>), requiring no
beads schema changes. Existing untyped memories are treated as "general".

Prime injection groups memories by type with feedback first (behavioral
corrections are highest-value context for agent sessions).

Closes gt-2rev

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
